instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to industry standards including SysML for system modeling (including IBDs), AADL, ACME, and MontiArc as architecture description languages, and methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT for managing system complexity and integrating heterogeneous stakeholders."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The system implements X.509 certificate-based authentication and TLS encryption for secure communication within the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) framework [50], MQTT protocol with TLS encryption for message transmission using Mosquitto [52], and role-based access control (RBAC) in Thingsboard [53] for user permissions management."
]
